header.description: Main navigation header with logo and menu

sidebar_toggle.description: Sidebar toggle button - opens/closes navigation sidebar

footer.description: Footer with links and legal information

main_content.description: Main content area containing all quests

personal_quests_section.description: Personal quests section with description and join button

daily_quests_section.description: Daily quests section with tasks and rewards

weekly_quests_section.description: Weekly quests section with recurring tasks

available_tab.description: Tab showing available quests to complete

linear_progress.description: Linear progress bar showing quest completion

join_now_button.description: Button to join the quests system (for guests)

view_all_button.description: Button to view all quests in a category

claim_reward_button.description: Button to claim quest reward (shows amount)

faq_container.description: FAQ section with questions and answers

sidebar_container.description: Primary navigation sidebar with toolbar icons

known_behaviors: Quests organized in sections (Personal, Daily, Weekly, VIP, Promo)
Tabs filter quests by status: Available, Completed, Locked, All
Reward buttons display amounts (USD or exp points)
Guest users see 'Join Now' button, authenticated users see quest list
Material-UI components used throughout (MuiButton, MuiGrid, MuiLinearProgress)
Lazy loading - quest cards load dynamically
Mission labels show progress (e.g., '0 / 20' for spins requirement)
